name: generic-json-duplicate-true-red
goal: Negative control: two JSON files with the same filename stem must fail the generic integrity gate.
command_argv: from pathlib import Path; import json; root=Path('demo_json/cards'); (root/'a').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (root/'b').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); (root/'a'/'apple.json').write_text(json.dumps({'id':'apple-a','kind':'demo'}, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8'); (root/'b'/'apple.json').write_text(json.dumps({'id':'apple-b','kind':'demo'}, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8')
gotchas: This should fail closed with duplicate_json_stems.
